ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the student's account */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected graduation date */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the student (active, graduated, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the instructor's account */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the instructor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the instructor */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the instructor was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "class_description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the class */,
  "room_number" TEXT /* Room number where the class is held */,
  "max_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students the class can accommodate */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours the class is worth */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "semesters" (
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each semester */,
  "semester_name" TEXT /* Name of the semester */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the semester */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the semester */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic year the semester belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("semester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the academic year */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the academic year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the academic year */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the academic year (active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_classes" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the class */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the student is enrolled in */,
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the semester the class is offered in */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic year the class is offered in */,
  "gpa" REAL /* GPA for the student in the class */,
  "attendance" REAL /* Attendance percentage of the student in the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_classes_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES academic_years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_classes_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_classes_semester_id FOREIGN KEY ("semester_id") REFERENCES semesters ("semester_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_classes_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment the grade belongs to */,
  "grade" REAL /* Grade earned by the student */,
  "grade_date" TEXT /* Date the grade was recorded */,
  "grade_type" TEXT /* Type of grade (e.g., quiz, exam, assignment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES student_classes ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the assessment belongs to */,
  "assessment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assessment */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of assessment (e.g., quiz, exam, assignment) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the assessment in the overall grade */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the assessment */,
  "instructions" TEXT /* Instructions for the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessment_grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment the grade belongs to */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment the grade belongs to */,
  "grade" REAL /* Grade earned by the student */,
  "grade_date" TEXT /* Date the grade was recorded */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback for the assessment grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_grades_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_grades_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES student_classes ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment the feedback belongs to */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was recorded */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who provided the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES student_classes ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment the progress belongs to */,
  "progress_text" TEXT /* Text of the progress */,
  "progress_date" TEXT /* Date the progress was recorded */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who recorded the progress */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_progress_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES student_classes ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_progress_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student the progress belongs to */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the progress belongs to */,
  "progress_date" TEXT /* Date the progress was recorded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the progress */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_progress_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_progress_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the report belongs to */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who generated the report */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., midterm, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the data belongs to */,
  "data_name" TEXT /* Name of the data */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value of the data */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the data (e.g., average grade, pass rate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)
